overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage depicting 9th century Baghdad. The clip opens with a high vantage point overlooking the city, transitions to an aerial cinematic sweep of the Round City walls and Tigris river, then follows the hooded protagonist walking through busy streets and a courtyard plaza with Islamic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: high vantage point overlooking historic city center

agents.ego_description: standing on a high ledge overlooking the city of Baghdad with slight camera rotation

entered.detail: prominent blue domed building visible in the distance across the city
cluster of palm trees below the vantage point
rectangular water pool in the courtyard directly below
sprawling cityscape of sand-colored buildings extending to the horizon
hazy desert dunes visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a high ledge overlooking the vast city of Baghdad. A prominent blue-domed mosque rises in the distance above the dense urban skyline, while palm groves and a courtyard pool are visible directly below. The camera slowly pans across the panoramic view of the desert city.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of walled city and river

events.description: cut to black then transitions to sweeping aerial cinematic view of the Round City

agents.ego_description: aerial camera sweeping over the city walls and river with no visible character

entered.detail: massive stone fortification walls surrounding the city
wide blue river curving along the city edge
large mosque with green dome and multiple minarets
packed residential rooftops viewed from above

segments.scene_description: Following a brief cut to black, the perspective shifts to an aerial drone shot sweeping over the Round City of Baghdad. The massive city walls, the Tigris river, and a green-domed mosque dominate the view as the camera glides forward over the dense urban fabric.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic market street leading to courtyard plaza with fountain

events.description: horse rider passes by on the right side of the street
character turns right to circle around the central fountain plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through busy historic streets and navigating around a central courtyard fountain

notable_agents.action: riding a gray horse through the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: two-story stone building with arched windows and wooden balconies
market stalls covered with green fabric awnings
octagonal stone fountain with multiple tiers in the plaza center
ornate stone archway leading to another section of the city
building facade adorned with blue geometric tile patterns
building covered in flowering blue vines and greenery

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bustling street lined with Islamic stone architecture and green market canopies. A horse rider passes by on the right as the character approaches a central plaza with an octagonal stone fountain. The character circles the fountain, passing buildings adorned with blue decorative tiles and flowering vines, while navigating through moderate crowds of pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a sweeping aerial perspective of Baghdad's vast skyline down into the intimate, bustling life of its city streets. It begins from a high ledge overlooking a dense urban landscape where a prominent blue-domed mosque rises above distant palm groves and courtyard pools. The perspective then shifts into a cinematic aerial sweep, gliding over the massive walls of the Round City and the flowing Tigris river toward a green-domed mosque. As the camera descends into the city, the scene transitions to a first-person walk through a bustling street lined with stone architecture and green market canopies. The movement finally leads through a crowd of pedestrians toward a central plaza, circling an octagonal stone fountain surrounded by blue decorative tiles and flowering vines.
